title: converting to Shareable boards via API?
excerpt: Is this possible? I dont see any API documentation on the website.

posts.author: RacerX (Ryan)
posts.cookedHtml: Is this possible? I dont see any API documentation on the website.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @RacerX,

As of today, it is not possible to change the board type of a board via the API.

Thank you for your request
